spec.expr:
_stream:{fgt.type=${type:doublequote},fgt.subtype=${subtype:doublequote},log.syslog.hostname in (${firewall:doublequote}),fgt.vd in (${vdom:doublequote})}
| fgt.tunneltype:in(${tunneltype:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw}
| fgt.action:"tunnel-up"
| NOT fgt.srccountry:Reserved 
| stats by (fgt.srccountry) count() results 
| sort by (results) desc 
| limit 10

_stream:{fgt.type=${type:doublequote},fgt.subtype=${subtype:doublequote},log.syslog.hostname in (${firewall:doublequote}),fgt.vd in (${vdom:doublequote})}
| fgt.tunneltype:in(${tunneltype:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw}
| fgt.action:"tunnel-up"
| fgt.srccountry:* AND NOT fgt.srccountry:Reserved 
| stats by (fgt.srccountry) count() results 
| sort by (results) desc 
| limit 20

_stream:{fgt.type=${type:doublequote},fgt.subtype=${subtype:doublequote},log.syslog.hostname in (${firewall:doublequote}),fgt.vd in (${vdom:doublequote})}
| fgt.tunneltype:in(${tunneltype:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw}
| fgt.action:"ssl-login-fail"
| NOT fgt.srccountry:Reserved 
| stats by (fgt.srccountry) count() results 
| sort by (results) desc 
| limit 10

_stream:{fgt.type=${type:doublequote},fgt.subtype=${subtype:doublequote},log.syslog.hostname in (${firewall:doublequote}),fgt.vd in (${vdom:doublequote})}
| fgt.tunneltype:in(${tunneltype:doublequote}) AND ${Logsql:raw}
| fgt.action:"ssl-login-fail"
| fgt.srccountry:* AND NOT fgt.srccountry:Reserved 
| stats by (fgt.srccountry) count() results 
| sort by (results) desc 
| limit 5

spec.name: Logsql
spec.description:
Custom LogsQL filter attached to every query.
Set to "*" to not filter.
See https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victorialogs/logsql/
